sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I lungngaih tawntung ding in ah,
Mawh na a lian i neih na pi,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: “Tate aw” hong cih na Pasian tate,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa tawh kinai theih na ding
“Ka ta it te aw” ci’n hong sam
A ang sung i khawl ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nung ciang i min bangci than ding
Tu’n ki thei nai lo hi
A mah i sun ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Sihna a zo min thang Topa
